description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and lint using the rust:latest Docker image (rust:1.20 for the x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu-1.20 job) and a cache keyed by $CI_JOB_NAME that stores apt-cache/, cargo/, and target/. Define a before_script that creates $APT_CACHE_DIR when $EXTRA_PACKAGES is set, runs apt-get update and installs $EXTRA_PACKAGES, adds /root/.cargo/bin to PATH, runs rustup target add $TARGET (ignoring errors), and executes cargo update. For each build job (aarch64-linux-android, aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu, aarch64-unknown-linux-musl, arm-linux-androideabi, arm-unknown-linux-gnueabi, arm-unknown-linux-gnueabihf, arm-unknown-linux-musleabi, armv5te-unknown-linux-gnueabi, armv7-linux-androideabi, armv7-unknown-linux-gnueabihf, armv7-unknown-linux-musleabihf, i586-unknown-linux-gnu, i586-unknown-linux-musl, i686-linux-android, i686-unknown-freebsd, i686-unknown-linux-gnu, i686-unknown-linux-musl, mips-unknown-linux-gnu, mips-unknown-linux-musl, mips64-unknown-linux-gnuabi64, mips64el-unknown-linux-gnuabi64, mipsel-unknown-linux-gnu, mipsel-unknown-linux-musl, powerpc-unknown-linux-gnu, powerpc64-unknown-linux-gnu, powerpc64le-unknown-linux-gnu, s390x-unknown-linux-gnu, sparc64-unknown-linux-gnu, x86_64-linux-android, x86_64-unknown-freebsd, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu-1.20, x86_64-unknown-linux-gnux32, x86_64-unknown-linux-musl, x86_64-unknown-netbsd) set stage build, inherit the shared before_script, and run the script commands: cargo build --target=$TARGET, cargo build --target=$TARGET --no-default-features, and if DISABLE_TESTS is not set run cargo test --target=$TARGET; each job defines its own variables (TARGET, optional EXTRA_PACKAGES, linker environment variables, and DISABLE_TESTS) and some are marked allow_failure true. Add a rustfmt lint job that runs in stage lint, allows failure, and executes rustup component add rustfmt-preview followed by cargo fmt -- --check. No artifacts, services, or deployment targets are defined.
